report_evidence: EXTERNAL SEO SNAPSHOT: TTFB 1.379s, target below 0.8s
likely_cause: WordPress.com hosted infrastructure with Batcache. TTFB depends on cache hit/miss status. Server-side rendering overhead. Limited control on managed hosting.
proposed_fix: 1. Confirm Batcache is caching correctly (check cache HIT/STALE headers). 2. Reduce plugin overhead where possible. 3. Note: hosting-level TTFB improvements may require hosting tier change.
risk_of_fix: LOW for cache verification. HIGH for hosting changes.
staging_required: NO for cache check. YES for any hosting changes.
expected_business_impact: MEDIUM - faster initial response improves user experience
expected_seo_impact: MEDIUM - TTFB is a ranking signal
acceptance_criteria: TTFB consistently below 1.0s on cache HIT
rollback_plan: No rollback needed for cache verification
data_source_label: EXTERNAL SEO SNAPSHOT + LIVE SERVER AUDIT
